'''Bryndar''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] that, during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], was in the middle of an ice age. That, along with its remoteness, made it the perfect spot for individuals such as [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] to hide, which is what [[Flynn Kybo]], [[B'dard Tone]] and [[Codi Ty]] did during their hunt for [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]].

==History==
Two smugglers hid on Bryndar during the Clone Wars.

The planet was the site of a [[Ambush at Bryndar|battle]] of the [[Western Reaches Operation]] during the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Reconquest of the Rim]] in [[17 BBY/Legends|17 BBY]].<ref name="TEGtW" />

{{Planet-stub}}
